$meta.purpose: Aesthetic rules and design DNA for future screen generation

moodSummary: Enterprise support portal: neutral backgrounds, clean border line dividers, a single vibrant Cloudflare Orange brand color for logos/highlights, and a strong Accent/Primary blue for functional CTAs and links. Layout is highly compact (information-dense) to serve technical operators quickly.

principles.name: Neutral and flat backdrop
principles.rule: The background canvas is built from high-brightness neutral grays. Cards and surfaces sit flat with subtle border hairline separators rather than floating with large shadows.
principles.evidence: Background is oklch(0.9875 0 0), border uses oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1) or oklch(1 0 0 / 10%) dark; shadow utilities are rarely used except for card/dropdown hover states.

principles.name: Brand orange vs functional blue
principles.rule: Use cloudflare-orange (#f6821f) strictly for brand identity elements, key status badges, illustration accents, and premium visual tags. Functional triggers, standard buttons, selection menus, text links, and hover states must use primary/accent blue.
principles.evidence: Logo, badges (e.g. 'Fastest'), Ask AI sparkles, and illustrations use Cloudflare Orange; standard button hover states, focus rings, link texts, active sidebar highlights use var(--primary) or var(--accent).

principles.name: Extreme structural density
principles.rule: Keep component sizes small and compact. Text uses 12px (text-xs) to 14px (text-sm) for most UI controls. Default button height is h-8 (32px), with smaller variants going down to h-7 (28px) or h-6 (24px). Spacing and paddings use conservative values (p-3 to p-6).
principles.evidence: Sidebar navigation items, breadcrumbs, dropdown select text, footer links all default to text-xs or text-sm. Button sizes default to h-8 with options for xs (h-6) and sm (h-7).

principles.name: Restrained decoration
principles.rule: Avoid heavy graphics. Use simple line icons, subtle border-radius controls, and flat, clean grids. Background illustrations, if used, are styled as simple monochrome vectors wrapped inside neutral rounded frames.
principles.evidence: SeeWhatsNew panel features an SVG illustration inside a bg-muted/20 border-border/50 wrapper, keeping the visual style flat and integrated.

doList: Reserve vibrant orange strictly for brand indicators, logos, and high-priority labels.
Pair primary blue triggers with white text to ensure accessibility.
Utilize fine 1px dividers (border-border) to group items cleanly instead of using large margins.
Ensure both light and dark mode mappings exist for any newly added surface colors.
dontList: Don't use large, soft, colorful drop shadows (keep surfaces flat or use standard small shadow-sm).
Don't use oversized text (keep page headers around text-xl or text-base).
Don't create primary buttons using orange gradients (use flat blue var(--primary) instead).
Don't increase line heights or margins to make the UI look spacious (keep layout dense and technical).
